title: Manual source pipeline idempotency proof (synthnote)
problem: Ticket-092 proved the manual synthnote spine succeeds once. Next smallest proof is that re-running each pipeline command on the same source does not duplicate claims, links, relationships, or qualification evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Unit test runs full spine twice and asserts stable row counts for claims, links, relationships, and qualifications.
Existing manual and golden tests remain green.
non_goals: No live Ollama, export, schema migration, or production code changes.
rollback_plan: Delete the idempotency unit test file.
